targets.rawSql:
SELECT action, status, destructive, count(*) AS actions, max(started_at) AS latest_started_at
FROM mcp_audit_log
WHERE started_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY action, status, destructive
ORDER BY actions DESC;

SELECT action, project, service_name, actor, started_at
FROM mcp_audit_log
WHERE destructive = true
  AND approval_id IS NULL
  AND status IN ('planned', 'pending_approval')
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT action, project, service_name, error, started_at
FROM mcp_audit_log
WHERE status = 'failed'
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT action, project, service_name, actor, status, started_at
FROM mcp_audit_log
WHERE action ILIKE '%credential%'
  OR action ILIKE '%connection%'
  OR action ILIKE '%secret%'
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
